pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which sets DATASET='/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv' and initializes Jamovi with this file.
Confirmed via task.json description which explicitly requests saving the output to this file path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Big Five Inventory (BFI) dataset located at '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv'. The agent computes an 'Extraversion_Score' by reverse-coding items E1 and E2, then averaging them with E3, E4, and E5. The agent must perform an Independent Samples T-Test comparing the score across genders (with Effect Size and Descriptives enabled). The correct ground truth group means are 3.97 for Males and 4.21 for Females. The final analysis must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Extraversion_Gender_Analysis.omv'.
